title: Kilner Round Drinks Dispenser Stand, Stainless Steel, Black
features: ELEVATES DISPENSER FOR EASY POURING | Raises Kilner drinks dispensers to a suitable height, making it easy to fill glasses of various shapes and sizes.
COMPATIBLE WITH MULTIPLE SIZES | Designed to fit Kilner 3L, 5L, and 8L drinks dispensers, offering versatility for any setup.
STURDY & PRACTICAL DESIGN | Made with a durable stainless steel coating for stability and long-lasting use, perfect for frequent use.
CURVED LIP FOR TAP ACCESS | Thoughtfully designed with a curved lip at the front to accommodate the dispenser tap, ensuring smooth and convenient serving.
IDEAL FOR EVENTS & HOME USE | Perfect for weddings, parties, catering, and everyday use, adding style and functionality to beverage serving.
THE KILNER STORY | With over 180 years of trusted craftsmanship, Kilner offers innovative, sustainable food storage and preserving solutions, blending heritage with quality.
